ksa_text: Knowledge of data administration policies and procedures, including data access governance, data usage monitoring, and operational data management governance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: knowledge contains GOV-relevant signals ("access   :policy|control|management|governance|review|rights", "data access   :policy|governance|request|control|rights|review") within a Data Governance context (affinity 0.55). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A IC Privacy Engineer would encounter this competency in governance practice.
